name: I dont know...
description:
That's it, folks, the worst has happened.

As some of you already know, I'm unemployed, so I was surviving with my parents. But unfortunately, our life has never been a bed of roses.

My father was always in debt and, although he had a decent salary, there was rarely anything left over. It wasn't too much of a problem because we survived. But now things have taken a turn for the worse.

His debts have gotten too high and now the bank is sucking up all the money we have. I was worried before about not getting a job and now I don't even know what's going to happen to me.

In the worst case scenario, I won't be appearing here anymore, neither on the main profile nor on the secondary one, so I'd like to give my last thanks to you who enjoyed my bots, and to you who made donations, no matter how small.

I'll update you all as soon as possible if anything gets better.

Farewell.

ᅠ

Your dear mute,

Ashley.
creator: Kounaisha
